response.justification: Maria is a highly versatile Staff Software Engineer with a strong polyglot background and proven distributed systems expertise. However, she lacks the executive-level leadership experience strictly required for this CTO role. Her resume shows no track record of scaling engineering organizations, developing technical leadership layers, or architecting production-grade, stateful multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes financial environments, making her unsuitable for this executive position.
strengths: Over a decade of hands-on software engineering experience across varied tech stacks and distributed systems.
Recent individual contributor experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated architectural capability through building an event-driven, open-source GIS platform from scratch.
concerns: Zero executive leadership or CTO-level experience; career history consists almost entirely of individual contributor roles.
Lacks the required track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people and managing external delivery partners.
Missing deep, production-grade architectural experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments.
